200# return «
choose a throne:

Event: Carnival Mole-opoly
Event Date: 01/11/2021
Sage Bot Item Code: A55


Other locations the gear can be found
Red Dragon
Mystic Dragon
Spinning Top of Death

Triggers: At start of the battl

The arrow of events marks a random fighter with an arrow. It constantly changes the target and changes its color when doing so. Also it heals an ally with 22200 health, or deals 27000 damage to the enemy.

Once in a while, one of the following effects is triggered, which depends on the color and the target of the arrow.
On enemy:
- Red arrow sets the target on fire. The enemy takes 100000 damage and has reduced healing by 65% for 5 sec.
- Blue arrow freezes the fighter. He cannot move and attack for 2 sec. It also increases the cooldown of his equipment and artifact abilities by 2 sec.
- Green arrow poisons the fighter. He takes 25000 damage for 3 sec, his attack speed and damage are reduced by 10% every second.
On ally:
- Red arrow restores 22000 health.
- Blue arrow puts a shield that absorbs all magic damage for 3 sec.
- Green arrow puts a shield that absorbs all physical damage for 3 sec.

Requirements: 90-100

User rating: item not rated yet
